---
title: "Session 31"
author: "Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
date: "April 8, 2026"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
# Multiple regression

# Full model

# step wise selection

#  AIC comparison
dof same, Aic decrease
```

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
set.seed(123)

# Load libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
data(mtcars)
head(mtcars)
```

```{r}
# Scatterplot with regression line
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Weight vs MPG",
       x = "Weight",
       y = "Miles per gallon")
```

```{r}
# SIMPLE LINEAR REGRESSION

# Fit model
model1 <- lm(mpg ~ wt, data = mtcars)

# Summary
summary(model1)
```

```{r}
# Extract coefficients
coef(model1)
```

```{r}
# Predictions
new_data <- data.frame(wt = c(2.5, 3.0, 3.5))
predict(model1, newdata = new_data)
```

```{r}
#  INFERENCE

# Confidence intervals for coefficients
confint(model1)
```

```{r}
# Prediction intervals
predict(model1, newdata = new_data, interval = "confidence")
```

```{r}
predict(model1, newdata = new_data, interval = "prediction")
```

```{r}
# Residual standard error
summary(model1)$sigma
```

```{r}
# DIAGNOSTICS

# Diagnostic plots
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(model1)
```

```{r}
# Residuals vs fitted (custom)
ggplot(data.frame(fitted = fitted(model1),
                  residuals = resid(model1)),
       aes(x = fitted, y = residuals)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Residuals vs Fitted")
```

```{r}
# MULTIPLE REGRESSION

# Fit multiple regression model
model2 <- lm(mpg ~ wt + hp + cyl, data = mtcars)

# Summary
summary(model2)
```

```{r}
# Compare models
summary(model1)$r.squared
```

```{r}
summary(model2)$r.squared
```

```{r}
# ANOVA comparison
anova(model1, model2)
```

```{r}
# MODEL SELECTION

# Full model
full_model <- lm(mpg ~ ., data = mtcars)
```


```{r}
# Stepwise selection
step_model <- step(full_model, direction = "both", trace = 0)

summary(step_model)
```

```{r}
# AIC comparison
AIC(model1, model2, step_model)
```

```{r}
#  NONLINEARITY

# Polynomial regression
model_poly <- lm(mpg ~ poly(wt, 2), data = mtcars)

summary(model_poly)
```

```{r}
# Plot polynomial fit
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point() +
  stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),
              se = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Polynomial Regression (Degree 2)")
```

```{r}
# TRANSFORMATIONS

# Log transformation
model_log <- lm(log(mpg) ~ wt, data = mtcars)

summary(model_log)
```

```{r}
# MODEL VALIDATION

# Train-test split
set.seed(42)
train_index <- sample(1:nrow(mtcars), 0.7 * nrow(mtcars))
```

```{r}
train_data <- mtcars[train_index, ]
test_data  <- mtcars[-train_index, ]
```

```{r}
# Train model
model_train <- lm(mpg ~ wt + hp, data = train_data)

# Predict on test
pred <- predict(model_train, newdata = test_data)
```

```{r}
# RMSE
rmse <- sqrt(mean((test_data$mpg - pred)^2))
rmse
```


```{r}
# CAPSTONE STYLE ANALYSIS


# Example workflow

# 1. Explore data
summary(mtcars)
```

```{r}
# 2. Fit model
final_model <- lm(mpg ~ wt + hp + qsec, data = mtcars)
```

```{r}
# 3. Check diagnostics
par(mfrow = c(2,2))
plot(final_model)
```

```{r}
# 4. Interpret coefficients
summary(final_model)
```

```{r}
# 5. Make predictions
predict(final_model, newdata = data.frame(
  wt = 3,
  hp = 120,
  qsec = 18
))
```

```{r}
# MULTICOLLINEARITY CHECK

# Install if needed
# install.packages("car")
library(car)

vif(model2)
```

```{r}
# VISUALIZATION ENHANCEMENT

ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg, color = factor(cyl))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "MPG vs Weight by Cylinders",
       color = "Cylinders")

```
